scripts.init-db: node -e "const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3').verbose(); const db = new sqlite3.Database('./amazon_clone.db'); const fs = require('fs'); const sql = fs.readFileSync('../database/init.sql', 'utf8'); db.exec(sql, (err) => { if (err) console.error(err); else console.log('Database initialized'); db.close(); });"
